---
title: "tidyusmacro"
format:
  html:
    include-in-header:
      - _includes/minimal-sidebar.html
      - _includes/back-sidebar.html
---

An R package providing utilities to retrieve and tidy U.S. macroeconomic data series from public government data providers. Install from [GitHub](https://github.com/mtkonczal/tidyusmacro).

```{=html}
<iframe src="https://www.mikekonczal.com/tidyusmacro/" style="border: none; width: 100%; height: 800px" frameborder="0"></iframe>
```
